titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 2561
GA 2561
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Word break corrected at 6.46 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 10.10 by Rachel Kevern.
Gap tags fixed in 9.25, 9.28, 30, 31, 20.1 and 20.5 and supplied text in 9.25, 26, 27, 30, 31, 20.1, 2, 3, 4 and 5 taken out of supp tags by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 15.16 corrected by David Parker.
Iota adscripts removed by David Parker.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status: Τhe first leaf is missing from 0.0 to halfway through 1.17.Τhe final leaf finishes at 21.13 with the rest of the text being added as a supplement (see 325611).G-Α number: 2561Νame of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 235rΒase text: ΤRnsΤranscribed by: acmΤranscription begun: 6.9.10Τranscription finished: 27.1.11Ιs this a transcription made from a collation: Νo.Ιf so, who did the collation:Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Ιnitials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples - Yes 12.40 Οbeloi (æ) - Νo Οther remarks: Τhere are leaves missing from 11.52-12.34 and 13.29-14.17

ab.note: This correction could also be by C1.
This correction may have been reinforced by C2.
This correction could also be by C1.
This correction could also be by C1.
This correction might be by Corrector 1 (the roughened surface makes it hard to be certain).
For the end of 21.13 to 22.0 see supplement.
